nasb.text: “Everyone who divorces his wife and marries another commits adultery, and he who marries one who is divorced from a husband commits adultery.

esv.text: “Everyone who divorces his wife and marries another commits adultery, and he who marries a woman divorced from her husband commits adultery.

cnv.text: 凡休妻另娶的，就犯了姦淫；娶被丈夫所休的，也是犯了姦淫。

ccb.text: 任何人休妻另娶，就是犯通奸罪，娶被休的女子也是犯通奸罪。”

csbs.text: “凡是休妻另娶的，就是犯通奸罪；凡是娶了被丈夫休的女人的，也是犯通奸罪。
